name_en: 【Celebrity Style】🔥Medium Deer Leather Flamenco Purse New Handbag 👜The Flamenco Purse bag features a pleated design 💄with a signature knot and other key details. Stylish and versatile 😍Can be carried as a handbag 🧸or paired with a donut ⛓chain shoulder strap or a leather strap for crossbody. 👛This version is made of soft Nappa lambskin. *Can be worn on shoulder, crossbody, or handheld*Detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap*Detachable donut chain decorated with Anagram Engraved Pebble texture*Subtle magnetic closure*Suede lining* 🫶🏼LOE💋WE Gold or Silver Plated ❤️
